hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep '\.py$' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'ruff format "{}" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "{}" 2>/dev/null' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep '\.py$' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'uv run mypy --strict --no-error-summary "{}" 2>&1 | head -5' || true
echo '<shoal-context>Shoal project: Python 3.12+, async-first. `just ci` for verification. See CLAUDE.md. mypy --strict, conventional commits, 618 tests, 80% coverage gate.</shoal-context>'
